title: oenothera micrantha var. hirtella
intro: Oenothera micrantha var. hirtella, also known as small-flowered evening primrose, is a variety of the evening primrose plant, belonging to the Onagraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The seeds of Oenothera micrantha var. hirtella have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including menopausal symptoms, skin issues, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved skin health, and alleviated menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as an herbal supplement, oil, or tincture, and is often used in natural remedies for its potential to promote overall well-being.
